summary: Defines the IPv6 addressing architecture: the addressing model, unicast/anycast/multicast address types, and the three text representations of IPv6 addresses (eight colon-separated 16-bit hex groups, '::' zero compression, and the embedded-IPv4 form x:x:x:x:x:x:d.d.d.d). Obsoletes RFC 3513 and is the base specification any IPv6 parser must accept. Updated for output formatting by RFC 5952.
title: IP Version 6 Addressing Architecture
